products.name: Gendes Sweet Aromatic Feminine Care Wash Foam Bubble Gum 50ml
products.tagline: Sweet feminine wash with food-grade flavour.
products.description: Foam wash dengan 5 bioaktif (Manjakani, Daun Bidara, Piper Betle, Niacinamide, B5). pH-balanced, dermatology tested, BPOM certified.

products.name: Gendes Feminine Spray Peach 30ml
products.description: Spray ringan untuk pemakaian sepanjang hari. Aroma peach lembut, food-grade flavour, tidak lengket.

products.name: Gendes Starter Bundle (Wash + Spray + Travel Pouch)
products.description: Bundle hemat: foam wash 50ml, spray 30ml, dan travel pouch. Sempurna untuk pemula atau hadiah.
